'''gajozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obb|obb]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obb|obb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gajozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæjezheth|gæjezheth]] || [[word:gæjezhej|gæjezhej]] || [[word:gæjezhesh|gæjezhesh]] || [[word:gæjezhe|gæjezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajojozhoth|gajojozhoth]] || [[word:gajojozhoj|gajojozhoj]] || [[word:gajojozhosh|gajojozhosh]] || [[word:gajojozho|gajojozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajozhoth|gajozhoth]] || [[word:gajozhoj|gajozhoj]] || [[word:gajozhosh|gajozhosh]] || [[word:gajozho|gajozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajofzhoth|gajofzhoth]] || [[word:gajofzhoj|gajofzhoj]] || [[word:gajofzhosh|gajofzhosh]] || [[word:gajofzhof|gajofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gajozhotho|gajozhotho]] || [[word:gajozhojo|gajozhojo]] || [[word:gajozhosho|gajozhosho]] || [[word:gajozhoko|gajozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gajozhoth|gajozhoth]] || [[word:gajozhoj|gajozhoj]] || [[word:gajozhosh|gajozhosh]] || [[word:gajozho|gajozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gajozhothol|gajozhothol]] || [[word:gajozhojol|gajozhojol]] || [[word:gajozhoshol|gajozhoshol]] || [[word:gajozhokol|gajozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gajozhothotho|gajozhothotho]] || [[word:gajozhojojo|gajozhojojo]] || [[word:gajozhoshosho|gajozhoshosho]] || [[word:gajozhoko|gajozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gajozhothon|gajozhothon]] || [[word:gajozhojon|gajozhojon]] || [[word:gajozhoshon|gajozhoshon]] || [[word:gajozhokon|gajozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gajozhothoro|gajozhothoro]] || [[word:gajozhojoro|gajozhojoro]] || [[word:gajozhoshoro|gajozhoshoro]] || [[word:gajozhokoro|gajozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
